title: Pogathe Pogathe Song Lyrics Deepavali
stanzas:
yaarendu neeyum
enai paarkum podhu
uyire uyir poguthadi

kallaraiyil kooda
kannal ondru vaithu
undhan mugam paapaenadi

Kalainthaalum megam
adhu meendum mithakkum
adhupolathaane undhan
kadhal enakkum

nadai paadhai vilakkaa
kadhal vidinthavudan
anaipatharkku.
neruppaalum mudiyaathamma
ninaivugalai azhippatharkku

unakkaaga kaathiruppen
o ho ho..
uyirodu paarthiruppen
o ho ho.

Azhaganaan neram
adhai neethaan koduthaai
azhiyaatha sogam athaiyum
neethaan koduthaai

kan thoongum neram paarthu
kadavul vandhu ponadhupol
en vazhvil vanthe vaanaai
yemaatram thaangalaiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Pogathe Pogathe expresses the feelings of love and separation, highlighting the emotional turmoil of being apart from a loved one.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Deepavali, this song plays during a pivotal moment that showcases the protagonist's deep emotional connection with their love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Yuvan, who is also the music director, showcasing his dual talent in this beautiful track.

When was the song released?

Pogathe Pogathe was released on February 9, 2007, as part of the Deepavali soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pogathe Pogathe, the protagonist expresses deep emotions of love and longing, beautifully captured through Yuvan's soulful rendition. The song serves as a poignant reminder of the bittersweet nature of relationships, where love and separation coexist. Set against the backdrop of Deepavali, it enhances the narrative by conveying the protagonist's inner turmoil and affection. This melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pogathe Pogathe from Deepavali is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Yuvan's soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into this enchanting track that beautifully blends emotion with melody, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: If you are here, I will stay.
If you leave, I will suffer.
The times I spent with you have completely captured my heart.
When you look at me, it feels like my life is leaving me.
Even in darkness, I see your face and it makes me feel sad.
Even if it breaks, the cloud will come back, just like your love for me.
The path of love is bright, but it can also lead to pain and memories that can't be erased.
I am waiting for you, oh ho ho... I am looking at life, oh ho ho.
You gave me beauty, and you also gave me sorrow that cannot be forgotten.
Looking at the time when I sleep, it feels like God has come to my life, bringing the sky with him.
Without you, the world feels dark.
